name: White Beach Hotel
message: puertogalerawhitebeachhotel.com zoominfo.com/c/white-beach-hotel/539244554 White Beach Hotel Puerto Galera is a vibrant beachfront hotel offering cozy accommodations and delicious dining options. With a variety of packages designed for couples, families, and groups, the hotel caters to vacationers looking for a tropical escape filled with relaxation and adventure. Guests can enjoy air-conditioned rooms, daily breakfasts, and hassle-free transportation to explore the beautiful surroundings
